title: Primus Monthly Engineering Report — 2026-06
key_findings: 4 PRs merged to main in the 2026-06 monthly window (Bug Fix: 1, Turbo/Dependency Version Update: 1, CI/Infra: 1, Other: 1).

Backend dependency pin change: PR #735 bumps PRIMUS_TURBO_COMMIT from 06b8d3fe (Add HYBRID FP8 format support for Triton backend, Primus-Turbo #278) to 3974fc24 (feat: refine rmsnorm ops, Primus-Turbo #343) in both ci.yaml and benchmark.yaml (+9 commits), and also updates tools/daily/safe_wrapper.py. PRIMUS_TURBO_AITER_COMMIT and TRITON_COMMIT are unchanged in the monthly window.

PR #735 adds first-class PrimusTurboQuantizedTensor / PrimusTurboQuantizedTensorPair weight caching in primus/backends/megatron/core/extensions/primus_turbo.py to avoid per-microbatch weight re-quantization on FP8/FP4 paths, introduces a _WeightGradBridge autograd.Function to keep wgrad accounting consistent with Megatron's distributed optimizer / DDP, consolidates PrimusTurboGroupedLinear per-expert weights into a single self.weights Parameter with zero-copy views, swaps the RMSNorm fallback to primus_turbo.pytorch.ops.normalization.rmsnorm end-to-end, and snapshots/restores per-module is_first_microbatch in pp_warmup_patches.py.

PR #733 back-merges Release/v26.3 into main: 74 examples/megatron/configs/MI325X/*-{BF16,FP8}-pretrain.yaml configs, 22 examples/torchtitan/configs/MI325X/* configs, an MI300X mamba_370M update, an MI355X llama3.1_405B FP8 tweak, plus primus/backends/megatron/core/models/{hybrid,mamba}/ code (HybridStack **kwargs + args-fallback; new mamba_block.py / mamba_layer_specs.py) to enable YAML-driven Mamba pretrain configs on the Primus Megatron backend.

PR #728 flips the default of NCCL_PXN_DISABLE in examples/run_pretrain.sh from 1 to 0 to fix multi-node training failures on clusters with AINIC (LWPAAC-6085); existing environment overrides continue to win.

PR #739 unifies the weekly + monthly periodic-report data plane: adds tools/backend_gap_report/periodic_reports.py (shared cadence config + schema validation + combined index), adds build_monthly_reports_index.py, refactors build_weekly_reports_index.py, and has build_site_bundle.py assemble a combined reports-data/index.json (per-report JSONs remain the source of truth). Stops tracking docs/*/dashboard-data/index.json (rebuilt by tooling). This monthly report is the first to populate the new monthly data plane.

Megatron-LM upstream drift: pin d3528a21 (2026-03-06) is now 632 commits behind upstream HEAD 7d9f259d (2026-06-02), +174 since the 2026-W19 snapshot 7cdf652c. Highlights since W19 include: Make Mamba conv params direct mixer params (#4899), Migrate GPT builder (#4741) and mamba builder (#4550), Add opt-in MXFP8 LM-head output projection (#4825), Preserve non-FSDP-unit buckets across AllGatherPipeline reset (#4717), Simple and stable Inference APIs (#4697), Skip gradient updates when grad norm exceeds threshold (#3460), HybridEP for DSv3 on H100 (#5039), Megatron-FSDP A2A overlap (#3797), Drain predecessor reduce-scatter at dispatch time (#4940), Combine GEMM + SwiGLU fused MLP (#4636), fully remove legacy code (#4759). Recommendation: plan sync (unchanged).

torchtitan upstream drift: pin 5fb7cc2e (2025-10-15) is now 692 commits behind upstream HEAD 04a30985 (2026-06-02), +82 since the 2026-W19 snapshot 4ebb0895. Highlights since W19 include: HybridEP torch.compile support + eager integration tests (#3360), DTensor shadow-node embedding OOB fix (#3480), Consolidate MXFP8 Linear and GroupedExperts converters (#3473), MoE consolidations [5/n-8/n] (#3386, #3389, #3423, #3425), Module-build conversion for Qwen3-VL (#3446) and Flux (#3445), RoPE refactor (#3395), Replace from_nn_module with native Module subclasses (#3398), Config-based Full DTensor for Llama3 (#3159), FSDP symmetric memory configuration (#3105), GraphTrainer separate EP process groups (#3369), rework full_inductor_compilation_pass via regional_inductor (#3346), weighted interleaved multi-source dataloader (#3063). Recommendation: urgent sync (unchanged; pin is now ~7.5 months stale).

Primus-Turbo Q2 quarterly drift: CI pin advanced +48 commits (333b68d7 -> 3974fc24); benchmark pin advanced +53 commits (a4488f6c -> 3974fc24); CI and benchmark pins are now in sync. AITER pin advanced (e83f9903 -> b5e03ed1) earlier this quarter (pre-window PR #723, 2026-05-15) and is unchanged in the June window. TRITON_COMMIT remains 88b227e (introduced in W19 PR #694). Recommendation: monitor (new pin landed).

No backend-gap reports regenerated this month: all six third-party submodule SHAs are unchanged in the monthly window (third_party/Megatron-LM, third_party/torchtitan, third_party/Megatron-Bridge, third_party/Emerging-Optimizers, third_party/HummingbirdXT, third_party/maxtext). The Primus-Turbo pin bump is a tracked-config backend-version change, but Primus-Turbo is not currently surfaced as a separate backend under docs/backend-gap/, so the existing megatron-upstream-main and torchtitan-upstream-main report sets are unaffected.
